composite_acquisition_score.description: Weighted composite of all signal categories. Scale 1-10. Higher = more attractive for acquisition.
composite_acquisition_score.notes: supply_risk is negative — higher supply = lower acquisition score. All other signals are positive.

impact.description: How much does this gap limit the research quality?

frequency.description: How many zones will hit this same gap?

effort_inverse.description: How easy is this to build? Inverted so easy = high score.

heat_score_bumps.description: Events that bump a zone's rotation_priority_score, making it rotate sooner.
